seoTitle: Turn On Dark Mode in Smartsheet Easily
metaDescription: Reduce eye strain by switching Smartsheet to dark mode through the Desktop App theme settings or browser-based dark theme extensions.
intro: Long hours in bright spreadsheet grids can wear on your eyes. This guide covers switching Smartsheet to a darker, high-contrast theme through the Desktop App's native settings, as well as browser-based alternatives if you're working in a web tab.

steps.heading: Check your account preferences
steps.body: Open your personal account settings to find interface preference options for theme modifications.

steps.heading: Enable dark theme in the Desktop App
steps.body: Activate light, dark, or system-synchronized appearance preferences natively inside the standalone Smartsheet Desktop App.

steps.heading: Use browser dark mode as a fallback
steps.body: If you're working in a browser tab, popular dark theme toggles or developer flags can force high-contrast dark mode.

steps.heading: Check how your grid renders
steps.body: Review how row colors, Gantt bars, and status cards look after switching, since some colors may need adjusting for contrast.

steps.heading: Fix text visibility issues
steps.body: Adjust font contrast levels if any text becomes hard to read in the new theme.

faq.question: Does Smartsheet have a native dark mode?
faq.answer: Yes, the standalone Smartsheet Desktop App includes light, dark, and system-synchronized appearance options.

faq.question: Can I get dark mode in the web browser version?
faq.answer: Browser-based dark theme toggles and developer settings can force a dark appearance, though it's not a native in-app browser toggle.

faq.question: Will my Gantt bars and status colors still be visible in dark mode?
faq.answer: Most render fine, but it's worth reviewing your grid rows and cards after switching to check contrast.

faq.question: Is dark mode better for long work sessions?
faq.answer: Many people find a dark, low-glare theme easier on the eyes during long stretches of spreadsheet work.
